headline: Is It Time To Revisit Seagate Technology Holdings (STX) After Its 353% One Year Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Seagate Technology Holdings is still reasonably priced after a strong run, the starting point is to look closely at how its current share price compares to estimated fair value. The stock recently closed at US$380.07, with a 7.6% decline over the last 7 days and a 6.8% decline over the last 30 days, set against a 32.2% year to date return and a 353.3% return over the past year. Recent coverage has focused on how a very large 3 year return of 522.6% and a 465.9% 5...
